title: Wholesale Supplier and Exporter of Fresh Fruit
subtitle: Production, commercialization and distribution for national and international markets
intro: At Fruit Service, we operate as producers, marketers and exporters of fresh fruit, providing tailored solutions for supermarkets, distributors and the horeca channel.
highlights: Large daily volumes with strict quality control at origin
Full traceability and compliance with international standards
Modern facilities and efficient international logistics
Over 50 years of experience in the fruit and vegetable sector
